company_url.title: Company Website URL
company_url.description: Primary URL of the company to research

company_name.title: Company Name (optional)
company_name.description: If omitted, will be extracted from the website

linkedin_url.title: LinkedIn Company URL (optional)
linkedin_url.description: If omitted, will be auto-discovered via Brave search

brave_api_key.title: Brave Search API Key
brave_api_key.description: Brave Search API key for discovery & SEO

browserbase_api_key.title: Browserbase API Key
browserbase_api_key.description: Browserbase API key for heavy crawling (optional)

li_at.title: LinkedIn li_at cookie
li_at.description: LinkedIn authentication cookie for company + jobs scraping

apify_token.title: Apify Token (for chained scrapers)
apify_token.description: Apify token for invoking child scrapers (Twitter, Reddit, Reviews)

include_competitors.title: Include competitor analysis
include_competitors.description: If true, runs abbreviated research on top 3 competitors

max_pages_crawl.title: Max pages to crawl on company website
